name: Lionel-Groulx
blurbEn: Lionel-Groulx is a major transfer station (Orange and Green lines) serving Saint-Henri and Little Burgundy — two of Montreal's fastest-appreciating neighbourhoods. Formerly industrial, these areas have transformed into vibrant mixed-use communities with trendy restaurants, converted lofts, and new condo projects. Investors who moved in 5–10 years ago have seen significant capital appreciation.
blurbFr: Lionel-Groulx est une grande station de correspondance (lignes Orange et Verte) desservant Saint-Henri et la Petite-Bourgogne — deux des quartiers de Montréal à l'appréciation la plus rapide. Anciennement industrielles, ces zones se sont transformées en communautés mixtes vibrantes avec restaurants tendance, lofts convertis et nouveaux projets condo.
